high_level_description: A cream-colored car drives on a road toward Nyon, with a red bus and blue car ahead, under green trees near a river.

style.lighting: even daylight with no strong shadows
style.photo_or_art: hand-drawn comic book art with bold outlines and flat color fills

background: A scenic road flanked by lush green trees and rolling hills. A river runs alongside the road, with a small wooden dock visible. A village with red-roofed houses appears in the distance. The sky is clear and light blue.

objects.name: Cream Car
objects.desc: A cream-colored vintage car with rounded edges, a white bumper, and black tires. The rear has a license plate reading 'VD 6532' and a 'Rover' badge. Two dark silhouettes are visible inside. Motion lines indicate movement.

objects.name: Red Bus
objects.desc: A red vintage bus with a boxy shape, rounded corners, and black tires. It has two large front windows and a grille. Motion lines suggest it's moving forward on the road.

objects.name: Blue Car
objects.desc: A small blue vintage car with a rounded body and black tires. It is positioned ahead of the cream car, moving along the road. Motion lines indicate forward motion.

objects.name: Nyon Sign
objects.desc: A blue rectangular road sign with white text reading 'Nyon'. It is mounted on a metal pole beside the road, positioned near the riverbank. The sign is clearly visible against the green foliage.

objects.name: Text Banner
objects.desc: A white banner at the top of the image with black cursive text. The text is centered and spans the width of the image. The font is elegant and slightly stylized.
